About.headline: I break AI agents.
About.myth: The closest echo of the world they lost; the one place they allow themselves to be sentimental.

blocks.heading: Who I am
blocks.body: Praneesh R V — 20, from Hosur, Tamil Nadu, in my final year of B.Tech CSE (Cybersecurity) at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Coimbatore. One line runs underneath everything I build: I break AI agents.

blocks.heading: Focus
blocks.body: AI red teaming is my single focus. Offensive security, product building, and study all serve it. I work across pentesting, agent-security research, and shipping real tools with heavy multi-agent assistance — Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, Gemini.

blocks.heading: Practice
blocks.body: Co-founder of CTF team Hunter (~#8 India, 50+ events), specialising in OSINT, forensics, and web exploitation. The adversarial mindset from the capture-the-flag circuit feeds straight back into how I probe agents for failure.

blocks.heading: How I work
blocks.body: Multi-agent everything: I spin up agents to brainstorm, plan, build, and review. I care about provenance, privacy, and governance — unfinished work stays out of training data. Arch Linux + Hyprland, dark mode always.

Research.headline: How thinking machines fail
Research.myth: Built so no Kindled would ever forget; its surface is shelves, and every shelf is full.

blocks.heading: Attack surface
blocks.body: AI red teaming of agentic systems: the MCP and A2A protocols, memory poisoning, tool misuse, JWT abuse, and agent-card trust chains. Where the model trusts, I look for the seam.

blocks.heading: Securin Research
blocks.body: Research intern (2026, via TIFAC CORE / Amrita) on AI red teaming. Probed live agent attack surfaces and merged contributions upstream to GranzionLab.

blocks.heading: Published
blocks.body: Agent-Redteaming-CTF-challs — a published set of agentic-AI-security CTF challenges, so others can learn to break what I break.

blocks.heading: Directions
blocks.body: Agentic-AI security research, with a parallel interest in Q1-level Linux OS research. Microsoft Security Research interview, Feb 2026.

Projects.headline: Tried in fire
Projects.myth: Where every dream is tried in fire; half its craters are stars that didn't take.

blocks.heading: Redcalibur
blocks.body: My AI-powered pentesting tool, mid clean-room 2.0 revamp. The offensive-security flagship — where agent-assisted building meets a real red-team workflow.

blocks.heading: Nabhasa
blocks.body: This portfolio — a flyable neutron-star system, and my most-worked project (built under the codename Dying Star). You are flying through it right now.

blocks.heading: L3m0nCTF 2025
blocks.body: Lead organiser and infra lead: GCP + CTFd, 200+ players. Built and ran the whole contest backbone.

blocks.heading: Also in the forge
blocks.body: axec-cli (Rust AppImage manager), SharedTaskTracker, Project Muginn, MultiAgent UAV, Guidewire DevTrails. Half the craters are stars that didn't take — the rest are still burning.

Experience.headline: Lights left on
Experience.myth: First lit when the Ember was new; its people went to the stars but left the lights on.

blocks.heading: AI Developer Intern — Joy IT Solutions
blocks.body: Apr – 27 Jun 2026, remote. Azure recruitment-agent platform: C#/.NET, Azure DevOps, Document Intelligence, Azure OpenAI GPT-4o, ADLS Gen2, Key Vault, OAuth2/PKCE/Azure B2C.

blocks.heading: Research Intern — Securin Research
blocks.body: 2026, via TIFAC CORE / Amrita. AI red teaming: MCP/A2A, memory poisoning, tool misuse, JWT abuse, agent-card trust chains.

blocks.heading: CTF — Team Hunter
blocks.body: Co-founder. ~#8 India / ~#102–121 global on CTFtime, 50+ events. Best finishes: CREST 3rd, CryptoNite 5th, Pragyan/KICTF 8th, H7CTF Finals 14th.

blocks.heading: Certifications
blocks.body: Google Cybersecurity Professional, Cisco Ethical Hacker, Fortinet NSE 1 & 2, Certified Blockchain Associate. PJPT (TCM) in progress; APISec ACP and CASA pending.

Contact.headline: Open a channel
Contact.myth: Every word to a hundred galaxies passes through this ring; it is the loudest mailbox in the Reach.

blocks.heading: Send word outward
blocks.body: Hiring, collaborating, or want to break agents together? Send word through the gate — every channel below reaches me.
